sourceNote: NVIDIA FY2025 Form 10-K. Income statement data from Consolidated Statements of Income; capital expenditure uses cash flow statement line item "Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets". Amounts in USD millions.

AMD FY2024 Form 10-K. Income statement data from Consolidated Statements of Operations; capital expenditure uses cash flow statement line item "Purchases of property and equipment". Amounts in USD millions.

TSMC FY2024 Form 20-F. Income statement data from Consolidated Statements of Profit or Loss and Other Comprehensive Income; capital expenditure uses cash flow statement line item "Acquisitions of property, plant and equipment". Amounts in NT$ millions.

ASML 2024 Annual Report based on US GAAP / Form 20-F. Issuer-level latest-year evidence uses revenue line item "Total net sales", operatingIncome line item "Income from operations", and capital expenditure cash flow line item "Purchase of property, plant and equipment". Amounts in EUR millions. ASML fiscal year is calendar-year aligned in this collected slice, with period ended December 31.

Broadcom FY2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K. Issuer-level latest-year evidence uses revenue and operatingIncome from the Consolidated Statements of Operations; capital expenditure uses cash flow statement line item "Purchases of property, plant and equipment". Amounts in USD millions. Broadcom refers to fiscal years by the calendar year in which they end; FY2024 was a 53-week fiscal year.

Micron FY2024 Form 10-K. Issuer-level latest-year evidence uses revenue and operatingIncome from the Consolidated Statements of Operations; capital expenditure uses cash flow statement line item "Expenditures for property, plant, and equipment". Amounts in USD millions. Micron fiscal year is the 52 or 53-week period ending on the Thursday closest to August 31; FY2024 was a 52-week fiscal year.

Arista Networks FY2024 row sourced from the 2024 Form 10-K. Issuer-level latest-year evidence uses revenue and operatingIncome from the Consolidated Statements of Income; capital expenditure uses the Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows line item purchases of property, equipment and intangible assets. Figures are converted from USD thousands to USD millions. Fiscal year is calendar-year aligned and ends December 31. CapEx stored as positive magnitude.

Vertiv FY2024 row sourced from the 2024 Form 10-K. Issuer-level latest-year evidence uses revenue and operatingIncome from the Consolidated Statements of Earnings (Loss); capital expenditure uses capital expenditures from the Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows. Figures are in USD millions. Fiscal year is calendar-year aligned and ends December 31. CapEx stored as positive magnitude.
